response: This code performs the fix-up procedure after inserting a node into a red-black tree, restoring the red-black properties by recoloring nodes and performing left/right rotations based on the uncle's color (Case 1: red uncle triggers recoloring; Cases 2/3: black uncle triggers rotations). It handles only the left-side cases shown here (where the parent is a left child), and finally ensures the root is black.
